## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped and surgical (every changed line traces to the stated purpose)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where it makes sense, and the suite passes locally
- [ ] Docs / comments updated if behavior or interfaces changed
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or machine-specific values introduced
